value.found_quote: A [forked subagent](/en/sub-agents#fork-the-current-conversation) is a subagent that inherits your full conversation context instead of starting fresh.
value.rationale: The page describes a "forked subagent" feature linking to a section anchored "fork-the-current-conversation," which substantiates the claim of a "Fork the current conversation" offering. No lifecycle qualifier indicating preview or deprecation is given, so it is presented as an active feature.
